adjudications.basis: reread: reread: AdminBasicInfoController.java has @CrossOrigin(origins="*") on every /adminbasic/** handler (lines 34,41,48,55,62,69,76,83,90,97,104,111,118,125,132,139,146,153,160,167), absent only on /welcome (line 30); pass-b's atom names the same annotation pattern at endpoint level
reread: reread: AdminBasicInfoController.java lines 34,63,147 confirm @CrossOrigin(origins="*") on the cited CRUD endpoints, part of the same all-endpoints-except-welcome pattern pass-a captured
